# Route Signature Architecture — Batch 10

Each background maps to:
- origin locality
- Stage I plot
- Stage II route vector
- Stage III family
- Stage IV family
- Stage V family
- legendary tags

Batch 10 adds explicit family-content scaffolding:
- Stage III family action pairs
- Stage IV family action pairs
- Stage V family action pairs
- distinct final boss and final hazard shells per Stage V family

This keeps the route-signature system modular while reducing reliance on generic mid-to-late-stage verbs.
